probes.name: settings-registry-hydrated
probes.description: SettingsRegistry has at least one group registered. Failure means discovery ran on an empty codebase.

probes.name: settings-schema-drift
probes.description: Compiled registry matches persisted snapshot from last deploy. Drift = a module renamed / removed a field without a migration job.

probes.name: settings-dual-write-listeners
probes.description: Both activity + audit listeners registered for SettingsChangeEvent. Critical for audit contract.
